title: Public Market Funding History
description: Same-origin, public read-only settled-history view for one eligible snapshot symbol. The browser never calls Binance; this payload comes from the backend reusing the snapshot time boundary and the per-symbol 30-minute successful-result cache. It carries settled 7D/30D annualization only; it does not return the current-period 24h estimate (the selected snapshot row stays authoritative for that).

funding_history.description: Newest-first settled records inside the inclusive 30-day window ending at the snapshot data_time. Pure projection of the already-published snapshot row: empty whenever the published row has no settled records (history_status: empty) — this does not prove this request (or any prior fetch) succeeded; a row never prewarmed or whose earlier history fetch failed also projects as empty, with no on-demand retry.

annualized_funding_7d.description: Settled 7-day calendar-window funding-rate sum * (365 / 7), or null for an empty window. Estimate/lastFundingRate never mixes in.

annualized_funding_30d.description: Settled 30-day calendar-window funding-rate sum * (365 / 30), or null for an empty window.
